mnemonics: Least Significant Bit (LSB) = Last Straw Behind Privacy
BPCS Steganography = Be Very Careful Sending Pictures Securely
Lossless data hiding = Little Secret Buried Inside
keyPoints: LSB encoding: Replace secret data with Least Significant Bit of Pixel Values
BPCS Steganography: Reorder Pixel Columns before encoding secret data
Lossless data hiding: Hide secret data in image without altering its properties
Benefits of data hiding: Secure, Capacity, Real-time, and Low-cost
Commonly used algorithms: LSB, BPCS, DCT, and PCA
Applications of data hiding: Digital watermarking, copyright protection, and image authentication
Security threats: Detection, Decoding, and Steganalysis
Future directions: New algorithms, Hardware implementation, and Advanced steganalysis techniques
